default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss HTML implementation for SmithAI templates and review progress on ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Elvis presented HTML template options for SmithAI's content, focusing on user-friendly design and functionality](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Team to refine HTML template design, implement email/PDF functionality, and ensure proper formatting](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Backlink report and content performance update to be provided asynchronously](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [SmithAI heavily relies on Facebook ads for lead generation, spending \~$250k/month with good ROI](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

## Topics

### HTML Template Design and Functionality

  - [Elvis created HTML templates for SmithAI's content](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Design is simple but functional, with fillable fields and dropdown options](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Team to refine design elements (e.g., spacing, font sizes, field lengths)](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Implement email/PDF functionality for user interaction](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Ensure proper formatting for USA date standards (month/day/year)](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Consider print-friendly options and potential Webflow integration](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

### Content Strategy and Implementation

  - [Focus on first 15 articles agreed upon](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Content similar to Service Titan but not directly copied](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Main feature is the interactive template portion](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Team to ensure content is original to avoid legal issues](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### User Data Capture and Email Integration

  - [Implement email capture for sending filled templates](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Explore options for integrating with MailChimp or Customer.io](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Consider using Webflow form or pop-up modal for data collection](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Involve SmithAI's web developer (Vol) for advanced functionality](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)

### Case Studies and Testimonials

  - [SmithAI currently handles case studies and testimonials in-house](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [They prioritize public reviews before creating video testimonials](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [GrowthX offered assistance with user stories/case studies if needed in the future](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Potential project to reorganize SmithAI's case studies page](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)

### SmithAI's Advertising Strategy

  - [Heavy reliance on Facebook ads (\~$250k/month spend)](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Lead costs range from $100-$200 for AI Receptionist product](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [Google ads are less effective, with costs around $1000+ per lead](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Organic leads cost about half of Facebook lead costs](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [SmithAI seeking to diversify ad channels due to high dependence on Facebook](https://fathom.video/share/uzxaeSgAdeF9Ls6JzRjLhqpzKgLxsz-u?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
